payload.answer: Duplicate Slack retry detected. No new memory should be committed from the repeated delivery.

entity_resolution.reason: The same Slack event ID was delivered twice; treat as a duplicate retry and do not create an additional memory card.

details: Detected duplicate delivery for the same Slack event ID.
Generated repair options only; no durable memory committed.

repair_options: Ignore the duplicate event delivery and keep any existing memory unchanged.
If a memory was already created from the first delivery, do not create another duplicate memory.
If duplicate memories were created, merge or delete the redundant duplicate while preserving a single statement: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
